description: Style Noteipanema draws inspiration from the Brazilian beach of Ipanema - it's design references the trend-setting seaside style. It takes highway fashion and mixes it with beach-bound cool. A vacay-ready look demands a pair like these lovely, colour pop flip flops. We recommend you snag more than one of these - need more reasons to buy? Supermodel Gisele Bundchen is the face of the brand!Product DetailsBranded rubber thong straps with a rivet that has a leaf shaped dangling charmCurved, textured rubber footbed in brown with printSingle piece outsole with curved groovesMaterial and careRubberWipe with a clean cloth to remove dust
